title: Better MC : Hunter's Edition
description: A lightweight yet immersive survival modpack that transforms Minecraft into a rugged hunter’s journey — no magic, no fluff, just exploration, danger, and the thrill of the hunt.
body:
# Better Minecraft: Hunter's Edition 🏹 > *"If you've grown too familiar with vanilla Minecraft, it's time to hunt again."* **Better Minecraft: Hunter’s Edition** is a performance-first, survival-centric modpack that reshapes Minecraft into a harsh, grounded, and rewarding hunter’s journey. There’s no magic. No high fantasy. No OP loot. Just cold nights, shifting seasons, buried ruins, and the primal drive to survive and thrive in the wild. --- ### ⚠️ Minecraft 1.21.1 Warning Minecraft 1.21.1 can use a **lot of memory and may crash or freeze**, especially when switching resource packs. #### To help reduce lag and crashes, use these **Java settings (JVM flags)** in your launcher: ``` -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -Xmx4G -Xms2G ```
What it does (click to expand) #### 🧠 What each part means (in plain English): - `-XX:+UseG1GC` → Uses a smarter memory cleaner (called G1) that keeps the game smoother by cleaning memory in small chunks instead of all at once. - `-XX:+DisableExplicitGC` → Blocks Minecraft or mods from doing random full memory cleanups that can cause big lag or crashes. - `-Xmx4G` → Sets the **maximum memory** the game can use to 4GB. This keeps the game from using too much and crashing your computer. *(set to half of what you have, like if you have ***8GB*** RAM set it to something like ***4GB***... if you aren't running anything else and on linux try to set it to ***5GB***, but no more than that)* - `-Xms2G` → Sets the **starting memory** to 2GB, so the game has enough room right from the beginning to load smoothly. 💡 **Tip:** Don’t switch resource packs while the game is running! Try to do it in the main menu
--- ### 🔑 Key Features - 🌍 **Overhauled World Generation** Terralith, Tectonic, and Explorify come together to completely transform the overworld into a rugged, dynamic, handcrafted landscape. Every cave, peak, and coastline feels natural and wild. The End is reborn with Nullscape; the Nether is reforged with Incendium. - 🏕️ **Brutally Improved Structures** Explore massive, lore-rich structures by YUNG’s suite — better strongholds, dungeons, temples, and mineshafts await across every dimension. Each structure is built to challenge and reward real hunters — no filler. - ❄️🔥 **Temperature Survival with Dynamic Seasons** Survive blizzards and heatwaves using Scorchful, Frostiful, and Fabric Seasons. Shelter, food, and clothing are your lifelines. Weather isn’t just visual — it kills. - 🧭 **Natural Map & Tracking Tools** No radar. No GPS. You’ll navigate with **Antique Atlas**, a hand-drawn journal-style map, and **Waystones** (Wraith) as your only fast travel method — if you find them. - ⚔️ **Grounded Progression & Combat** **Enchancement** replaces enchantments with skillful upgrades. **TreeChop** and **Veinminer** let tools feel real and powerful. Gear isn’t overpowered — it’s earned through survival, not XP farming. - 💡 **UI Improvements that Respect Immersion** **Jade** shows subtle block/entity info. **REI** supports recipe lookup. Mods like **Leave My Bars Alone**, **Advancement Plaques** and **Enhanced Block Entities** refine visuals and interactions without turning Minecraft into a theme park. - 💤 **Survival Realism & Quality of Life** **Steve’s Realistic Sleep** let's you leave things like smelting for when you sleep. **Gravestones** preserve your loot when (not if) you fall. **Inmis** gives you expandable backpacks to carry your kill. - ⚙️ **Built-In Optimization for Low-End PCs** Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, C2ME, and ModernFix combine to deliver a modded experience that runs smoother than vanilla. All video settings default to "Fast". Leaves, lighting, and particles are trimmed for stability. - 🚫 **No Shaders, No Flash, No Bloat** This modpack **does not support shaders out of the box**. Dynamic lights are handled natively with **LambDynamicLights** for minimal performance cost. If you want shaders, you’ll need to install Iris yourself — at your own FPS risk. - 💀 **Roast-Worthy Deathlines** Every death gets a personalized, darkly humorous message. Whether you freeze, fall, or fail, you'll die knowing you were hunted — and laughed at. --- ### ⚠️ Technical Notes - 🎮 **Performance-first configuration**: All settings are tuned for playability on older laptops and lower-end rigs. You’re welcome to turn up visuals — if your machine can take it. - 🧱 **No RPG, no automation, no fantasy systems**: There are no skills, no magic, no teleport scrolls, no endless inventories. This is survival with grit. - 🧭 **Maps don’t cheat**: You won’t find minimaps or teleport buttons. Antique Atlas must be opened manually like a real notebook. Mark your trails or get lost. --- ### 📦 Who Is This For? - Players who want **challenge and survival** without magic or tech. - Laptop gamers and performance-maxers who still want visual richness. - Hardcore explorers, solo nomads, and pack-builders with a theme. - Anyone tired of “Better Minecraft” packs that are just magic kitchen sinks. --- Play smart. Hunt hard. Survive longer. ---
📦 Mods Used & Credits (click to expand) ## World Generation 1. **Terralith** - Adds diverse, stunning biomes to overworld generation. 2. **Incendium** - Transforms Nether generation with new biomes and structures. 3. **Nullscape** - Enhances End dimension with unique terrain and structures. 4. **Tectonic** - Overhauls world generation with realistic terrain and biomes. 5. **YungsBetterMineshafts** - Enhances mineshafts with better structures and loot. 6. **YungsBetterDungeons** - Improves dungeon generation with unique layouts and challenges. 7. **YungsBetterStrongholds** - Overhauls strongholds with larger, more complex designs. 8. **YungsBetterDesertTemples** - Upgrades desert temples with better designs and loot. 9. **YungsBetterJungleTemples** - Revamps jungle temples with better aesthetics and loot. 10. **YungsBetterNetherFortresses** - Enhances Nether fortresses with improved layouts and features. 11. **YungsBridges** - Adds natural-looking bridges to world generation. 12. **Explorify** - Adds new structures to enhance exploration. ## Library 1. **Fabric API** - Core API for Fabric mods to function properly. 2. **Cloth Config** - Provides a config screen API for Fabric mods. 3. **Architectury** - Enables cross-platform mod development for Fabric/Forge. 4. **YungsApi** - Provides core functionality for YUNG's mods. 5. **Owo Lib** - Library for shared utilities in various mods. 6. **ForgeConfigAPIPort** - Ports Forge's config API to Fabric for mod compatibility. 7. **PuzzlesLib** - Shared library for Fuzs' mods with utility functions. 8. **Fabric Language Kotlin** - Enables Kotlin language support for Fabric mods. 9. **Yet Another Config Lib** - Provides a flexible config system for mods. 10. **Thermoo** - Adds temperature-based gameplay mechanics. 11. **Thermoo Patches** - Provides compatibility patches for Thermoo. 12. **InmisAddon** - An addon for the mod inmis which enhances the visuals for the backpack models. 13. **Silk All** - A Minecraft API for Kotlin. 14. **Fabric Seasons Terralith Compat** - Ensures Fabric Seasons compatibility with Terralith. 15. **Iceberg** - A modding library that contains new events, helpers, and utilities. 16. **Lithostitched** - Configurability and compatibility enhancements for worldgen. 17. **Surveyor** - Unified API, networking, and save data for map mods. ## Optimization 1. **Sodium** - Optimizes Minecraft's rendering engine for better FPS. 2. **Lithium** - Enhances server and game performance with optimized mechanics. 3. **FerriteCore** - Reduces memory usage through optimized data structures. 4. **C2ME** - Improves server performance with concurrent chunk generation. 5. **ModernFix** - Fixes performance issues and optimizes memory usage. 6. **EntityCulling** - Skips rendering of unseen entities to improve FPS. 7. **More Culling** - Changes how multiple types of culling are handled. 8. **ImmediatelyFast** - Boosts rendering performance for entities and blocks. 9. **Sodium Extra** - Adds extra graphical options to Sodium. 10. **MemoryLeakFix** - Patches memory leaks for smoother gameplay. 11. **Exordium** - Optimizes GUI rendering for better performance. 12. **Indium** - Rendering library for Sodium compatibility. ## Utility 1. **RoughlyEnoughItems** - Adds an item and recipe viewer for easy crafting. 2. **Jade** - Shows block and entity information on hover. 3. **Patchouli** - Provides in-game documentation for mods via books. 4. **ModMenu** - Adds a mod configuration menu for easy access. 5. **Antique Atlas** - Adds a customizable in-game map for exploration. 6. **Wraith Waystones** - Adds waystones for fast travel across the world. 7. **AppleSkin** - Displays food saturation and hunger information. 8. **Zoomify** - Adds a zoom function for better visibility. 9. **Controlling** - Improves keybind management and search in controls. 10. **Searchables** - Enhances search functionality in inventories. 11. **PickUpNotifier** - Displays notifications for picked-up items. 12. **Notebook** - Adds an in-game notebook for notes. ## Gameplay 1. **Veinminer** - Allows mining entire ore veins with one break. 2. **Inmis** - Adds backpacks for extra inventory storage. 3. **Trinkets** - Adds accessory slots for equipping trinkets. 4. **TreeChop** - Allows chopping entire trees with one axe swing. 5. **Gravestones** - **Gravestones** - Spawns gravestones to store items on player death. 6. **Fabric Seasons** - Adds seasonal changes to affect gameplay and visuals. 7. **Frostiful** - Adds cold weather mechanics and survival challenges. 8. **Scorchful** - Introduces heat-based mechanics for desert survival. 9. **CharmOfUndying** - Adds a totem of undying slot for convenience. 10. **Fabric Seasons Extras** - Adds extra seasonal content and mechanics. 11. **True Ending** - Enhances the End dimension with new gameplay features. 12. **StevesRealisticSleep** - Adds realistic sleep mechanics with time progression. 13. **EasyAnvils** - Simplifies anvil mechanics by removing the "Too Expensive" limit. 14. **Easy Magic** - Enchanting tables as they always should have been! Items stay after closing, and easy re-rolls. 15. **BetterThanMending** - Enhances mending enchantment mechanics. 16. **BridgingMod** - Enables faster bridging mechanics. ## Visual 1. **LambDynamicLights** - Adds dynamic lighting for held items and entities. 2. **EnhancedBlockEntities** - Enhances block entity visuals like chests and signs. 3. **Citresewn** - Enables custom item textures via resource packs. 4. **AdvancementPlaques** - Replaces advancement toasts with visually appealing plaques. 5. **Boosted Brightness** - Increases brightness levels beyond vanilla limits. 6. **LeavesBeGone** - Instantly removes leaves for faster tree clearing. 7. **CullLeaves** - Improves performance by culling non-visible leaves. 8. **Reeses Sodium Options** - Enhances Sodium’s settings menu for better usability. 9. **TooltipFix** - Fixes tooltip rendering issues for better readability. ## Miscellaneous 1. **Clumps** - Groups nearby items into single entities for less lag. 2. **CutThrough** - Allows weapons to cut through certain blocks like grass. 3. **LeaveMyBarsAlone** - Prevents status bars from moving during gameplay. 4. **DisableCustomWorldsAdvice** - Disables custom worlds warning screen on startup. 5. **Controlify** - Adds the best controller support to Minecraft Java edition! ## Resource Packs 1. **Faithful 32x** - Upscales vanilla textures while keeping their style. 2. **3D crops Revamped** - Adds 3D models to crops for better visuals. 3. **Recolourful Containers** - Adds colorful textures to storage containers. 4. **RAY's 3D Rails** - Adds 3D textures to rails for visual improvement. 5. **RAY's 3D Ladders** - Provides 3D textures for ladders. 6. **Remodeled Doors** - Improves door textures with 3D models. 7. **Better Lanterns** - Enhances lantern textures for better aesthetics. 8. **Even Better Enchants** - Enhances block entity rendering for better visuals. 9. **Death Messages** - 100+ Unique Death Messages. 10. **[https://vanillatweaks.net/]**
Credits (not to get copyright) : **[https://vanillatweaks.net/]**
